basic_info.description: The Architecture MasterPrize (AMP) is a global architecture awards recognizing design excellence, and advancing appreciation for quality architectural design.

Early Entry: April 30, 2026 Awards Designs of the Year Award Architectural Products Award Firm of The Year Award Architectural Photography Award Student Architecture Award Winners Designs of the Year 2025 Firm Awards 2025 Product Awards 2025 Photo Awards 2025 Event Jury Info & FAQ Media Partners ENTER Architecture Awards 2026 Celebrating creativity and innovation in architecture, interior design, landscape architecture, architectural product design and photography. Extended Early Entry deadline: April 30, 2026 ENTER THE 2026 AWARDS Architecture MasterPrize Winners Architecture Awards 2026 The annual Architecture MasterPrize (AMP) is an international architecture award recognizing design excellence. The AMP was created to advance the appreciation and exposure of quality architectural design worldwide. The prize celebrates creativity and innovation in architecture, interior design, landscape architecture, architectural product design and architectural photography . Submissions from all around the world are welcome. VIEW THE 2025 ARCHITECTURE AWARDS WINNERS HERE ENTER THE 2026 AWARDS HERE Architecture MasterPrize Award-Winning Firms Explore the AMP Icons of Architecture For over a decade, the Architecture MasterPrize has recognized the world's most outstanding work in architecture, interior design, and landscape — judged by an international jury of leading practitioners and critics. Past winners include globally renowned firms from over 81 countries, alongside emerging voices redefining contemporary design. Zaha Hadid Architects United Kingdom Renzo Piano Building Workshop Italy Tadao Ando Japan David Chipperfield Architects UK / Germany Steven Holl Architects USA Sou Fujimoto Japan Pei Cobb Freed & Partners USA BIG — Bjarke Ingels Group Denmark / USA Snøhetta Norway / USA KPF USA Skidmore, Owings & Merrill USA SHoP Architects USA Safdie Architects USA Ennead Architects USA Pelli Clarke Pelli USA Kengo Kuma Japan Heatherwick Studio United Kingdom Vo Trong Nghia Vietnam Koichi Takada Australia IBUKU Indonesia Explore the AMP Icons of Architecture 2025/26 Biennial Winners Gala Guggenheim Bilbao The Architecture MasterPrize gala returns to Bilbao for an evening celebrating the 2025/26 winners and global design excellence — presented in partnership with the Solomon R. Guggenheim Foundation on the bank of the Nervión River in the iconic Guggenheim Museum Bilbao. ⬥ Invitation Only Date Tuesday, November 24, 2026 Venue Guggenheim Museum Bilbao View Past Events 2025 Architecture Award Winners With thousands of submissions from 72 countries, AMP winners represent the embodiment of global excellence in architecture, interior, landscape, architectural product design, and architecture photography. --> Architectural Design of the Year 2025 SPORTS AND CULTURAL CENTER MARIE-JOSE PEREC AND JOSEPHINE BAKER Onze04 Architectes --> Interior Design of the Year 2025 SYMBOLPLUS OFFICE SYMBOLPLUS INC. --> Landscape Architecture of the Year 2025 Bamboo Villa 魏玛设计WEIMAR GROUP --> Architectural Firm of The Year 2025 Equator Works_ --> Interior Design Firm of The Year 2025 via architecture limited --> Landscape Architecture Firm of the Year 2025 OKRA landscape architects --> Exterior Architecture Photographer of the Year 2025 KAFD Shoayb Khattab --> Interior Architecture Photographer of the Year 2025 Concrete Memento GaryFive View All Winners 2026 Architecture Awards Programs Designs of the Year 2026 Recognizing and celebrating the best architectural, interior and landscape designs based on design excellence and innovation. Learn More Firms of the Year 2026 Recognizing the excellence of inspiring and innovative architectural firms based on their total body of work. Learn More Architectural Products of the Year 2026 Recognizing the most outstanding products and materials, which meet the exacting demands of construction in the 21st century. Learn More Architectural Photography of the Year 2026 The award recognizes outstanding architectural photography of the built environment. Learn More Student Architecture Award 2026 An international annual program to celebrate higher education students and recent graduates who have proven their dedication to the fields of architecture, interior, landscape and urban design. Learn More Interior Design Award 2026 The program recognizes interior design excellence, and celebrates the world’s best interior design projects across 11 categories. Learn More Featured News 2025 Architecture MasterPrize Winners The Architecture MasterPrize is pleased to present the winners of its 2025 edition, recognizing outstanding work across architecture, interior design, landscape architecture, product design, and architectural photography. This year’s submissions arrived from 72 countries, reflecting the global reach of the program and the wide range of perspectives represented in this year’s selection. We are equally grateful for the exposure that AMP's reach provides us and which helps us to move forward to our next clients." Chris Mitchell, CEO, M+M Creative Studio “It is tremendously rewarding to have our work recognized and appreciated, especially by knowledgeable and discriminating industry insiders. These awards have been especially meaningful because they reflect the opinions of architects, facility managers and specifiers who rely on our products and services to deliver superior performance and aesthetics for their projects.” Laura Rygielski Preston, president of Trex Commercial Products Jury Meet the top designers, architects, curators and academics who comprise our jury panel. --> Valerie Schweitzer Architects --> Valerie Schweitzer – Head of jury Valerie Schweitzer Architects --> JJP Architects and Planners --> Joshua Jih Pan, FAIA JJP Architects and Planners --> Cerno+Architekten --> Peter Cerno Cerno+Architekten --> University of Maryland --> Dr. Dawn Jourdan University of Maryland --> University of Calgary --> John Brown University of Calgary --> Ming Chuan University --> Dr Jeanne Lee Ming Chuan University --> Wentworth Institute of Technology --> Sedef Doganer Wentworth Institute of Technology --> Ema Peter Photography --> Ema Peter Ema Peter Photography Full Jury Partners, Media & Friends More Partners From our Partners Guggenheim Musem Bilbao The Guggenheim Museum Bilbao was the result of an extraordinary partnership between the Basque Institutions and the Solomon R. Guggenheim Foundation. More than a decade after its grand opening in October 1997, the Museum is a reality that has exceeded the most ambitious artistic and cultural expectations, and has contributed in an extraordinary way to the urban, economic, and social regeneration of the city of Bilbao and its surroundings.
